PatioGurus — Commercial Division — Greater Vancouver BC
Our Position

When an outdoor space performs well, it earns its keep. It seats more guests, extends the season, commands a premium, and builds the kind of first impression that travels. We work with commercial clients who hold their outdoor spaces to that standard.

Who We Work With

The right partner for projects
that demand precision.

We work directly with the people making decisions on commercial outdoor spaces: the operators who carry the P&L, the designers specifying the envelope, and the contractors building to programme. Each engagement is different. The expectation is not.

01
Restaurants & Hospitality

Every uncovered patio seat is revenue at risk. We help operators extend season, protect seating capacity, and create outdoor environments that justify a premium spend.

  • Year-round weather protection without permanent enclosure
  • Infrared heating that extends service into winter months
  • Retractable screens for wind, rain, and privacy control
  • Large-span umbrella systems requiring no building attachment
02
Architects & Designers

We function as a specialist partner on the outdoor envelope. Product specifications, CAD documentation, site visits, and installation coordination sit with one team, under one relationship.

  • Full technical specs and CAD files on request
  • Trade pricing and project volume discounts
  • European engineered products not widely available in Canada
  • Dedicated project contact from brief to handover
03
Builders & Developers

Pre-construction and multi-unit projects need suppliers who commit to a programme and hold to it. Our supply-and-install packages are built around your schedule, not a generic lead time.

  • Pre-construction specification and value engineering
  • Multi-unit volume pricing
  • Site coordination within your construction schedule
  • Post-handover service and warranty management

The Patio
Commercial Solutions

Each solution starts
with the outcome you need.

We do not lead with products. We lead with what you are trying to achieve: more covers, longer seasons, architectural coherence, code compliance, or all of the above. Every system is custom manufactured to your space and installed by our own team.

Featured Solution
Outdoor Rooms &
Louvre Roof Systems

Transform an exposed patio into a fully operational, all-season extension of your venue.

Motorized louvre blades give complete control over sun, rain, and ventilation. Paired with retractable side screens and integrated heating, the result is a weatherproof space that operates year-round without permanent enclosure. Ideal for hospitality venues, hotel terraces, and strata amenity spaces where year-round usability translates directly to revenue.

Explore Outdoor Rooms →
Weather & Privacy
Motorized Screens & Shades

Full seasonal flexibility without touching the building permit. Retract in summer. Deploy against rain and wind in winter.

Explore →
Shade & Rain Protection
Retractable Awning Systems

Building-mounted shade and rain protection with a clean architectural profile. Custom spans up to 12m. Swiss engineered.

Explore →
Freestanding Coverage
Large-Format Outdoor Umbrellas

Maximum coverage from a single base, with no building attachment required. Panoramic views preserved.

Explore →
Season Extension
Commercial Outdoor Heating

Bromic infrared systems extend operational season into winter with minimal visual intrusion on a carefully designed space.

Explore →
Supplier Partners

European engineering.
Specified for this climate.

The brands we work with are not available off the shelf in Canada. Each was selected for engineering quality, commercial track record, and the ability to perform in BC's variable climate season after season.

Stobag
Switzerland — Awnings & Louvre Systems

Swiss precision engineering across awning and louvre roof systems. A 10-year structural warranty and four decades of commercial project experience across Europe.

Caravita
Germany — Umbrellas & Parasols

German engineering with Italian craft sensibility. Caravita large-format umbrellas are found at Michelin-starred restaurants and luxury resort properties across Europe.

Bromic Heating
Australia — Outdoor Heating

The global benchmark for commercial outdoor heating. Bromic infrared systems are specified by architects worldwide for performance, efficiency, and a minimal presence in a premium space.

Wizard Screens
North America — Retractable Screen Systems

North American manufacturer with over 25 years developing retractable screen systems built specifically for the Pacific Northwest climate. A parent company of PatioGurus.

Selected Projects

Problems solved.
Spaces that perform.

Cannon Estate Winery
Abbotsford, BC

Building restrictions ruled out a permanent enclosure, but the client needed year-round patio revenue without losing the open air character guests come for in summer. SmartScreen motorized shades with clear vinyl provided complete wind and rain protection in winter and retracted entirely when the weather allowed. A compliance constraint became a commercial advantage.

Motorized Screens — SmartScreen
Year-round patio service. Full seasonal flexibility. No permanent structure required.
Pacific Institute of Culinary Arts
Vancouver, BC — False Creek

A waterfront terrace on False Creek needed weather coverage without obstructing the views that define the dining experience. The client also required a solution suited to a modern culinary facility. Stobag Resobox retractable awning provided on-demand shade and rain protection with a clean architectural profile that serves the building without competing with it.

Retractable Awning — Stobag Resobox
All-weather outdoor dining. Views and venue character preserved.
Seymour Golf & Country Club
North Vancouver, BC

An exposed restaurant patio with panoramic course views and no available building attachment points. Traditional awning systems were structurally incompatible. Caravita Amalfi Duo cantilever umbrellas delivered full table coverage from a single base. Sightlines were preserved entirely and no building works were required.

Umbrellas — Caravita Amalfi Duo
Full shade coverage. No building attachment. Course views unaffected.
